description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black surface and a vibrant, colorful graphic in the center depicting a stylized cartoon character in motion. The deck is constructed from layered wood, visible along the edges, and is topped with a black grip tape that covers the entire upper surface. The skateboard is equipped with four black wheels, each mounted on metal trucks that are attached to the underside of the deck. The wheels are classic street style, suitable for urban environments, and the trucks appear to be standard silver with no visible branding. The overall design is sleek and modern, with the bold deck graphic serving as a focal point.
description: A modern skateboard with a black deck, colorful central graphic, black grip tape, and classic street wheels on silver trucks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, colorful central graphic, and both sets of black wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose of the deck, the grip tape, and the central graphic's upper portion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the deck's length, graphic, and wheels from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail of the deck, grip tape, and the lower part of the central graphic.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: A vibrant, cartoon-style graphic featuring a stylized character in motion, with dominant colors including blue, red, and gray, set against a black background.
attribute_wheel_type: street, black, classic shape, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver trucks, standard kingpin, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape covering the entire deck, no visible patterns or graphics
